deposit_type_code.text: ประเภทเงินฝาก

root.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_dep_m_rule.int_account_id, sc_dep_m_int_step_rate.interest_rate, '' as mix_interest_rate, sc_dep_m_rule.keeping_group, sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond.period_calculate_bonus, sc_dep_m_fixed_deposit_cond.number_of_month_to_due, case when sc_dep_m_rule.keeping_group = '01' then sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond.period_calculate_bonus when sc_dep_m_rule.keeping_group = '02' then sc_dep_m_fixed_deposit_cond.number_of_month_to_due else 0 end as period_calculate , sc_dep_m_rule.minimum_balance_total, '' as status_account, sc_dep_m_int_step_rate.effective_date, '' as latest_update, '' as status_using, '' as entry_id, '' as entry_date FROM sc_dep_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_dep_m_int_step_rate, sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond, sc_dep_m_fixed_deposit_cond WHERE ( sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_dep_m_rule.int_account_id ) and ( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_int_step_rate.deposit_type_code ) and ( sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( sc_dep_m_fixed_deposit_cond.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ASC, sc_dep_m_int_step_rate.effective_date ASC
